problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
